violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food were stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. The wooden legs for counter tops in the bar area and kitchen by the bar are bare wood. The wooden shelf under the pizza oven in the kitchen by the bar is bare wood. The wooden bracket holding up the vent in the kitchen by the bar is bare wood. The wooden shelf for the microwave in the front kitchen is bare wood. These are not a cleanable surface.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. An open box of foam bowls was stored on the floor in the storage area by the walk in freezer.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile in the kitchen by the bar. Missing ceiling tile in the front kitchen over the stove.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
